mood: Exclusive, premium, mysterious, solid. Dunkel mit Deutschland Vibe. Deep navy mixed with Heimat Gold and runic inspirations.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. No cramped layouts.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tightly packed (gap-6) but spacious inside cards.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.audio_player: Crystal Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050810]/80 border-t border-[#C5A059]/20. Fixed at bottom. Ensure high saturation blur.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.sidebar: Solid flat surface bg-[#050810] border-r border-white/5. No shadows.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.playlist_cards: No visible border or background initially. On hover, apply a subtle scale to the image and reveal a soft gold glow (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(197,160,89,0.15)]).

components_instructions.buttons: Primary CTA uses bg-[#C5A059] text-[#050810] font-bold hover:bg-[#D4AF37]. Secondary uses bg-white/5 text-white hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10.
components_instructions.inputs: Shadcn standard but heavily customized: bg-[#0C111C] border border-[#1E293B] focus:border-[#C5A059] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C5A059] text-white.
components_instructions.audio_controls: Play/Pause button is prominent, rounded-full, and primary gold color. Other controls (shuffle, repeat, skip) are text_secondary, turning white on hover.
components_instructions.tables_tracklist: Borderless. Hovering a track row changes bg to white/5 and displays a gold play icon on the left.
components_instructions.upload_station: Dashed border border-[#1E293B]. On drag over, border turns to solid #C5A059 with a soft #C5A059/10 background fill.

animations.track_hover: Hovering over tracklist item shows a subtle background highlight and shifts text slightly right (translate-x-1).
animations.page_transition: Fade in with a slight upward translation (translate-y-4 opacity-0 to translate-y-0 opacity-100) using framer-motion.

login_hero_bg.description: Minimalistic gold and black textured abstract background for login/register page. Add a bg-[#050810]/70 overlay so forms are readable.

playlist_cover_1.description: Dark rippling water texture for abstract or algorithmic playlists.

playlist_cover_2.description: Dark forest filled with trees. Perfect for the 'Deutschland Vibe' / Heimat ambient playlists.

default_user_avatar.description: Abstract golden spiral on black for default user profile avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent: MUST use Cabinet Grotesk for Headings and Outfit for Body. (Include Google Fonts / Fontshare links in index.html).
MUST strictly adhere to the dark navy (#050810) and Heimat Gold (#C5A059) color palette. Do not use generic gray or generic yellow.
Language is strictly German for all UI text (e.g., 'Startseite', 'Bibliothek', 'Hochladen', 'Suchen', 'Freunde').
Audio Player must be fixed at the bottom using Crystal Glassmorphism, overlaying the content without blocking it (add pb-[100px] to main wrapper).
Track rows should have the 'data-testid' attributes like 'track-play-button', 'upload-form-submit-button'.
All SVGs/Icons must use current color context. Do not hardcode hex values in icons.
